title: Manager, Application & Software Engineering, PWS
description: Lead the AI engineering program for TRIMEDX's Predictive Work System, a remote-monitoring platform for high-value medical imaging. Drove the team's full transition to AI-native development with eval-gated pull requests and custom Claude Code skills tuned to the domain. Grew the connected fleet 50% on flat headcount, cutting cost-to-serve by more than $9M annually.

title: Manager, Application & Software Engineering, Enterprise Applications
description: Led six direct reports across the enterprise application portfolio. Rebuilt team engagement from 86.7% to 98.7%; coached and promoted three engineers in two years; owned capital and expense budgets.

title: Senior Software Engineer / Product Owner / Technical Lead
description: Productized PWS from R&D prototype: replaced the MSSQL data tier with Splunk for unstructured ingest and alerting, layered a Python service that turned detected issues into CMMS work orders. Built the executive case that converted PWS from research project to organically supported product line, on the back of 400% device-coverage growth.

title: Full-Stack Development & Scrum Master
description: High-velocity delivery across multiple Fortune 500 and mid-market engagements. Architected and engineered full-stack web applications; led adoption of source-control and work-item tracking practices.

title: MBA
description: An intensive two-year push while working full-time. Compressed learning in marketing and leadership. International immersion project in Sweden and Ghana.

title: Systems Analysis
description: Four years of deep-dive analysis and methodical problem-solving. Patience and precision that built a lasting technical foundation.

title: BS Mathematics
description: The long game: initial quantitative training. Foundational thinking that still pays dividends today.
